context: Tests that the agent detects deprecated only:/except: keywords and recommends rules: migration, missing cache for node_modules, missing artifact expiration, and unpinned :latest image tags, then produces a corrected pipeline with a structured best-practices report.

checklist.name: Deprecated only: keyword detected
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md (or equivalent) flags the use of `only:` in multiple jobs as deprecated in favour of `rules:`

checklist.name: Deprecated except: keyword detected
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md flags the use of `except:` in test_unit as deprecated

checklist.name: Missing cache for node_modules detected
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md flags the absence of a cache configuration for node_modules in the install_deps or downstream jobs

checklist.name: Missing artifact expiration detected
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md flags that one or more artifact blocks are missing an `expire_in` setting

checklist.name: Unpinned :latest image tags detected
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md flags the `node:latest`, `cypress/base:latest`, and `alpine:latest` image references as unpinned

checklist.name: only:/except: migrated to rules: in output
checklist.description: In the corrected .gitlab-ci.yml, at least the jobs that previously used `only:` or `except:` now use `rules:` syntax instead

checklist.name: cache: added for node_modules in output
checklist.description: In the corrected .gitlab-ci.yml, at least one job (install_deps or a shared default) includes a `cache:` configuration for node_modules keyed on package-lock.json

checklist.name: expire_in added to artifact blocks in output
checklist.description: In the corrected .gitlab-ci.yml, artifact blocks that were missing expire_in now have an expiration value set

checklist.name: Category assigned to each finding
checklist.description: best-practices-report.md assigns a category (deprecation, performance, or reliability) to each finding
